message:
feat(fwc): add credential store and operation locking (CUAL-C.1, M.2)

Encrypted credential store with ChaCha20-Poly1305, auth method auto-detection,
CRUD operations, and redaction middleware. Advisory operation locks with TTL-based
auto-expiry for multi-agent conflict prevention. Also fixes pipe.rs raw string
delimiter and stubs missing pipeline/events dispatch functions.

- credential_store.rs: 47 tests (auth detection, encryption roundtrip, CRUD, parsing)
- op_lock.rs: 42 tests (acquire/release/check, TTL expiry, GC, agent scoping)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
